_comment: Cross-implementation wire-format fixture for cryptox AES-256-GCM. Generated by Go (internal/cryptox) and consumed by both Go and TS test suites to prove byte-equality of the wire format. DO NOT regenerate without coordinating Phase 1 (TS) + Phase 2 (Go) updates — the SHA256 is recorded in both PRs.
wire_format: [1B version=0x01][12B nonce][N B ciphertext + 16B tag], base64(StdEncoding)
